title: 15mm Snap On Pipe Clip White Plastic Pipe Support Bracket for Secure Fixing of 15mm Pipes Pack of 50 for Plumbing Use
features: Snap-on 15mm pipe clip suitable for standard copper, plastic, or barrier pipe, providing reliable support for pipework.
Quick-fit design allows easy installation and removal without tools, saving time on plumbing jobs.
Made from durable white plastic, ideal for everyday domestic, commercial, or DIY plumbing work.
Keeps pipe runs neat, properly spaced, and securely held along walls, joists, or flat surfaces.
Supplied in a pack of 50, providing plenty of clips for multiple installations or larger plumbing projects.
description: " This 15mm snap on pipe clip is used for supporting and securing 15mm pipework along walls, joists, and surfaces. The clip holds the pipe firmly while allowing quick installation without tools. • Fits standard 15mm copper, plastic, or barrier pipe • Snap on design for quick fitting and removal • Made from durable white plastic for everyday plumbing work • Keeps pipe runs neat and supported • Suitable for heating, domestic water, and general plumbing jobs • Pack of 50 A practical clip for keeping 15mm pipework tidy, secure, and properly spaced during installation. "
